expected_findings.expected_treatment: Do not flag missing certified LCA as defect at initial intake.
Do not flag missing support letter as defect at initial intake.
Request renewed passport when available; advise on travel/I-94 implications.
Analyze home office for LCA/worksite purposes.
Do not treat title difference alone as material.
Degrees appear related; document nexus in drafting.
Review wage only after SOC, wage level, worksite, and prevailing wage data are determined.
Confirm full legal name and middle initial; do not treat as serious mismatch.

attorney_review.note: Expected findings are encoded for LEI workflow-stage evaluation; do not upload attorney-only materials during testing.
